# 宏鼎集成 Aegis Power Integrations

> Engineering × AI × Digital Transformation. Enterprise engineering
> integration and AI systems partner for semiconductor, data center,
> manufacturing and enterprise customers in Taiwan and APAC.

宏鼎集成股份有限公司 (Aegis Power Integrations Co., Ltd.) delivers
structured cabling, fiber optic, electrical and mechanical integration,
project management, and enterprise AI system integration, together with
the Aegis Business Apps product line (CostFlow, SalesOps, AI Launch).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Company overview, services, industries and capabilities.
- [About](/about): Company background, mission and team.
- [Engineering Integration](/engineering): Structured cabling, fiber, electrical, mechanical, PM and decommission services.
- [Project Experience](/energy-experience): Energy, mechanical and engineering project experience.
- [AI System Integration](/ai-integration): Workflow automation, AI agent, CRM, ERP, BI, enterprise AI.
- [Aegis CostFlow](/costflow): Engineering quotation and cost analytics platform.
- [Aegis SalesOps](/salesops): Sales management and AI weekly report system.
- [Aegis AI Launch](/ai-launch): Enterprise AI adoption service.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription and implementation plans.
- [Contact](/contact): Company contact information and inquiry form.
- [Book Consultation](/demo): Book an initial consultation.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms of service.
